     The Numbers Business Report

Here (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,237,270Details
International Box Office $3,756,359
Worldwide Box Office $15,993,629
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An original film about multiple families and a special place they inhabit. The story travels through generations, capturing the human experience in its purest form.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,875,195 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:76.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,647 opening theaters/2,733 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $12,940,565

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 1st, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 31st, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
October 31st, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
November 6th, 2024 (Wide), released as Here - Les plus belles années de notre vie (France)
November 22nd, 2024 (Limited) (Croatia)
November 28th, 2024 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: November 26th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material, some suggestive material, brief strong language and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2832 (cert #54315), 5/1/2024)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: One Location
Filming location (city or town): London, England
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom
Subgenre: Life Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: VVS Films, Miramax Films, ImageMovers
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
